creator: akosiaris@gmail.com
text:
As a maintainer I approve my own patch :-)
Kind of malformed though...


On Mon, Jan 13, 2014 at 9:10 PM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of devel/py-jira,
>
> Please note that PR ports/185753 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/185753
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
